name: useWebSocket
description: Hook that connects to a WebSocket server and handles incoming and outgoing messages
examples: const { status, close, send, open, client } = useWebSocket('url');

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the WebSocket server

source.source: * @param {UseWebSocketUrl} url The URL of the WebSocket server

tokens.name: url
tokens.description: The URL of the WebSocket server

parameters.name: options.onConnected
parameters.description: The callback function that is called when the WebSocket connection is established

source.source: * @param {(webSocket: WebSocket) => void} [options.onConnected] The callback function that is called when the WebSocket connection is established

tokens.name: [options.onConnected]
tokens.description: The callback function that is called when the WebSocket connection is established

parameters.name: options.onDisconnected
parameters.description: The callback function that is called when the WebSocket connection is closed

source.source: * @param {(event: CloseEvent, webSocket: WebSocket) => void} [options.onDisconnected] The callback function that is called when the WebSocket connection is closed

tokens.name: [options.onDisconnected]
tokens.description: The callback function that is called when the WebSocket connection is closed

parameters.name: options.onError
parameters.description: The callback function that is called when an error occurs

source.source: * @param {(event: Event, webSocket: WebSocket) => void} [options.onError] The callback function that is called when an error occurs

tokens.name: [options.onError]
tokens.description: The callback function that is called when an error occurs

parameters.name: options.onMessage
parameters.description: The callback function that is called when a message is received

source.source: * @param {(event: MessageEvent, webSocket: WebSocket) => void} [options.onMessage] The callback function that is called when a message is received

tokens.name: [options.onMessage]
tokens.description: The callback function that is called when a message is received

parameters.name: options.retry
parameters.description: The number of times to retry the connection

source.source: * @param {boolean | number} [options.retry] The number of times to retry the connection

tokens.name: [options.retry]
tokens.description: The number of times to retry the connection

parameters.name: options.protocols
parameters.description: The list of protocols to use

source.source: * @param {Array<'soap' | 'wasm'>} [options.protocols] The list of protocols to use

tokens.name: [options.protocols]
tokens.description: The list of protocols to use

returns.name: An
returns.description: object with the status, close, send, open, and ws properties

source.source: * @returns {UseWebSocketReturn} An object with the status, close, send, open, and ws properties
